title: Staged Phase 3 full spine idempotency (mock)
problem: Tickets 144–149 prove each staged spine step individually and generate-run-report is idempotent in isolation. Operators lack a single unit test proving re-running discover→report on the same DB does not duplicate rows across the full Phase 3 mock spine.
acceptance_criteria: Unit test runs full staged mock spine (discover through generate-run-report) twice on the same DB and asserts stable row counts.
Per-command re-run idempotency test covers discover, fetch, ingest-staged, extract, link, build, detect, reconcile, and generate-run-report.
No live LLM or live network in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
non_goals: Live Ollama or live OpenAlex network.
rollback_plan: Remove staged idempotency test file; retain ticket-149 run-report spine.
